payload.answer: The article at https://example.com/missing could not be remembered because the fetch operation resulted in a 404 network error. No content was processed.
payload.decision: Failed to fetch article content due to a 404 network error.

entity_resolution.reason: No entities could be extracted as the article content was not retrieved.

payload.intent: User requested to remember an article for its usefulness in memory architecture.

details: Article fetch failed with 404 network error.
No content was extracted or remembered from the URL.

repair_options: Verify the URL is correct and accessible.
Provide an alternative source for the content.
